## Summary

Describe the documentation, workflow, fixture, or code change.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `npm test`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run smoke` if workflow behavior changed.

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not add real AI provider calls.
- [ ] I did not add agent calls.
- [ ] I did not add API keys or secrets.
- [ ] I did not add dependencies without justification.
- [ ] I kept assumptions/questions/review_required labels visible.

## Boundary Notes

Mention any behavior that stays local-only, review-required, or intentionally not implemented.
